title: Archive: Embodied OpenRouter / WMFactory Gateway
description: Archive reason: this Notion item is operational model-serving infrastructure, not an independent survey project; OpenAI-compatible gateway patterns already exist and live work belongs in WMFactory / General engineering when needed.
summary: The embodied OpenRouter / WMFactory / new-api note is archived out of Survey so it does not masquerade as a research project. Keep it as an implementation pattern for model routing and inference integration.

details.text: The idea is to route embodied model inference through an OpenAI-compatible gateway, using systems such as new-api or WMFactory integration points. That is useful infrastructure but does not define a new paper, benchmark, dataset, or hardware decision by itself.

details: Moved-out live work: DreamX / Wan / other world-model inference integration should remain in the relevant Engineering or WMFactory task, where it can be validated with actual weights, dependencies, and inference smoke tests.
Archive decision: do not keep a separate Survey card unless there is a new model-routing benchmark or a cross-model embodied inference product spec.
risks_decisions: Archived 2026-05-31 after Notion ideas migration audit.
Reason type: operational infrastructure / duplicate of existing gateway patterns, not a standalone survey topic.
Reopen condition: a concrete WMFactory gateway implementation task with endpoint contract, models, auth, and smoke-test evidence is requested.
